compiled_state.title: RED: Test red-test-evaluator agent definition structure
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Create `tests/agents/test-red-test-evaluator.sh` using assert.sh library. Tests validate the evaluator agent definition.

Test functions (12 total):
1. `test_frontmatter_has_name_red_test_evaluator`
2. `test_frontmatter_has_model_opus`
3. `test_has_revise_verdict_section`
4. `test_has_reject_verdict_section`
5. `test_has_confirm_verdict_section`
6. `test_revise_includes_impact_assessment` — asserts impact_assessment is in REVISE section
7. `test_revise_mentions_in_progress_and_closed` — asserts both in-progress and closed task states mentioned
8. `test_confirm_infeasibility_categories` — asserts all 4 categories: infrastructure, injection, documentation, reference_removal
9. `test_input_contract_references_writer_output` — asserts agent references red-test-writer output
10. `test_output_contract_specifies_json_format` — asserts output is JSON, not YAML or prose
11. `test_output_contract_has_verdict_field` — asserts verdict field in output schema
12. `test_has_decision_logic_section` — asserts routing logic section exists

CRITICAL: No early-exit guard. Must exit non-zero when agent file absent (RED).

Add .test-index entry: `plugins/dso/agents/red-test-evaluator.md: tests/agents/test-red-test-evaluator.sh [test_frontmatter_has_name_red_test_evaluator]`
Note: RED marker is at position 1 (first test), so ALL tests are in RED zone until GREEN task removes the marker.

## File Impact
- CREATE: tests/agents/test-red-test-evaluator.sh
- MODIFY: .test-index (add entry)

## TDD Requirement
This IS the RED test task. Tests must fail (exit non-zero) before the GREEN task.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/agents/test-red-test-evaluator.sh
- [ ] At least 12 test functions
  Verify: grep -c '^test_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/agents/test-red-test-evaluator.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 12)}'
- [ ] Running test returns non-zero (RED)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/agents/test-red-test-evaluator.sh; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] .test-index entry exists
  Verify: grep -q 'red-test-evaluator.md' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: AC amendment (gap analysis): Tests use structural grep patterns on the .md agent file. This is an accepted exception for agent definition files — they have no runtime behavior, so structural metadata/schema validation is the only feasible test approach. This matches the precedent set by test-red-test-writer.sh. Document this in the test file header comment.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: RED verified — test exits non-zero (exit 1), all 12 tests fail as expected ✓
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: .test-index entry added with RED marker at position 1 ✓
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Task complete — tests/agents/test-red-test-evaluator.sh created, executable, 12 tests, all RED ✓
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
